/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/expense_tracker_gui.dir/expense_tracker_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/expense_tracker_gui.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/expense_tracker_gui.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o -o expense_tracker_gui -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
